name: Sweet Tomato Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1 whole head of garlic, peeled, coarsely chopped
1 piece fresh ginger root, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the chopped garlic and ginger into an electric blender. Add 4 ounces of red wine vinegar. Blend at high speed until smooth.
2. In a 3-quart heavy, non-reactive pot, combine the tomatoes (with juice from the can) and remaining vinegar, sugar, salt, and cayenne pepper. Bring to a boil.
3. Slowly add the puree from the blender into the pot. Reduce heat and let it simmer gently, uncovered, for about 1 1/2-2 hours or until thickened. Stir occasionally at first, then more frequently as it thickens. You should have approximately 1 pint of chutney.
4. Add the almonds and raisins to the chutney. Simmer, stirring another 5 minutes.
5. Turn off the heat and allow the chutney to cool. Bottle and keep refrigerated.
